lessons.title: SQLite concurrent writes need WAL mode
lessons.content: Switch to WAL journaling when SQLITE_BUSY surfaces under load. The default rollback journal serializes writers and produces busy errors under contention.

lessons.title: Indexes speed up SELECT queries
lessons.content: Adding indexes on JOIN columns reduces SELECT latency under load.

lessons.title: Race condition in concurrent SQLite reads
lessons.content: Reading while another connection writes can return stale data. Use BEGIN IMMEDIATE to lock the database for the read window.

lessons.title: Auth tokens belong in httpOnly cookies
lessons.content: Storing session tokens in localStorage exposes them to XSS.
